scripts.cleanup: (lsof -ti:3100 -ti:9090 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f proofmark-engine 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f 'ws-entry' 2>/dev/null; rm -f rust-service/data/index/LOCK 2>/dev/null; true)
scripts.dev: npm run cleanup && npm run prematerialize:oss && npm run db:up && concurrently --kill-others "PDF_UPLOAD_MAX_MB=${PDF_UPLOAD_MAX_MB:-10} npm run engine" "PROOFMARK_PREMIUM=0 PROOFMARK_DEPLOYMENT_MODE=${PROOFMARK_DEPLOYMENT_MODE:-oss} PDF_UPLOAD_MAX_MB=${PDF_UPLOAD_MAX_MB:-10} next dev --port 3100"
scripts.paid: npm run cleanup && npm run prematerialize && npm run db:up && concurrently --kill-others "PDF_UPLOAD_MAX_MB=${PDF_UPLOAD_MAX_MB:-100} npm run engine" "PROOFMARK_DEPLOYMENT_MODE=${PROOFMARK_DEPLOYMENT_MODE:-premium} PDF_UPLOAD_MAX_MB=${PDF_UPLOAD_MAX_MB:-100} next dev --port 3100"
scripts.db:up: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up db -d --wait 2>/dev/null || docker-compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up db -d 2>/dev/null || echo 'Docker not available — ensure Postgres is running on port 5436'
scripts.collab:ws: echo 'Collab WS is handled by the Rust engine on port 9090 at /ws/collab/{session_id}'
scripts.forensic:wasm: mkdir -p src/lib/forensic/generated && cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --features wasm --manifest-path rust-service/crates/forensic-core/Cargo.toml && wasm-bindgen rust-service/crates/forensic-core/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/forensic_core.wasm --out-dir src/lib/forensic/generated --target web
scripts.build: npm run prematerialize && rm -rf .next && next build && node scripts/wait-for-next-traces.mjs
scripts.validate: npm run prematerialize && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test
